intro: Enicosanthum grandiflorum, commonly known as the giant flower vine, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
